text:
Once upon a time in a quaint little farm town nestled between hills covered with wild roses, there lived a curious sheep named Daisy.

Daisy loved the stories her mother told her. One evening, as they sat beside their crackling fireplace, Daisy pippered earnestly.

"My favorite story," Daisy began,eyes wide.

Her mother leaned toward her.

"Danger."

Daisy shuffled anxiously.

"But listen." Daisy recounted a tale she loved.

There was a castle deep in the woods. The castle was home...

Continue.

Ah yes. There stood a wise old owl...

Just before bedtime.

Could sneak...

Into the castle. Why?

Because...

You knew...

Everybody.

There.

Just...

That way.

No.

There wasn't.

That's...

What I do.

There.

That's just.

You.

You know.

What I love.

That.

There.

We share.

That.

So.

Every night.

You.

Read.

That book.

You read.

All night.

They never heard
